question: Based on the area chart of annual profit from 2018 to 2022, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: Profit in both 2021 and 2022 appears to reach the same peak level.
options.B: Profit was lowest in 2020 among the years shown.
options.C: Profit decreased every year from 2018 to 2022.

explanation: Bars for the highest years exceed the canvas and are clipped, making them look the same height; the true relationship cannot be inferred from the visual.
